note: All measurements are per-step CPU inference (batch=1, seq_len=50, N=5 particles). Results vary by hardware. Paper results use Apple M4 CPU unless otherwise stated.

paper_table1_values.note: Values reported in Table 1 of the paper, measured on Apple M4 CPU
paper_table1_values.source: Measured using tasks/scripts/generate_latency_report.py on M4 hardware at paper submission time

verified_benchmarks_M4.note: Latest re-run on Apple M4 CPU (2026-02-24). Slight variation from paper values due to system load and thermal state differences.
verified_benchmarks_M4.discrepancy_note: Transformer 0.63ms here vs 1.10ms in paper. The paper value was measured under higher system load / with additional overhead from the rollout harness. Both measurements are valid but the paper footnote should clarify that latency is system-dependent.

transformer_large_bench.note: Transformer Large (37.8M params) bench from results/transformer_large_bench.json
transformer_large_bench.discrepancy_note: 24.88ms measured in isolation; 12.32ms was measured in an earlier run on different hardware configuration. Paper value updated to 24.88ms.
